evals.prompt: 把今天最值得写的一条 AI 新闻做成适合微信公众号发布的中文文章，风格要犀利一点，但别像低级标题党。最后给我一个可发草稿箱的标题和 HTML 结构建议。
evals.expected_output: Should choose a worthwhile angle, produce a strong Chinese title, and generate publishable公众号-style article guidance with HTML-ready structure.

evals.prompt: 我给你 3 个 AI 新闻链接，你别逐条翻译，帮我揉成一篇公众号短稿。要求开头两句就把人钩住，一句话一段，结尾告诉读者现在该怎么用这波变化。
evals.expected_output: Should synthesize multiple sources into one article instead of doing link-by-link summaries, keep short paragraphs, and end with practical action advice.

evals.prompt: 根据一条新发布的大模型消息，写一篇适合公众号的中文评论稿，重点不是复述参数，而是告诉普通读者这事到底意味着什么。如果适合发草稿箱，也请给出后续发布步骤。
evals.expected_output: Should prioritize meaning over specs, explain impact for normal readers, and mention draft-creation workflow when appropriate.
